name: Anas Alsaadi
about: Today, I study at Jönköping University with my areas of interest, Web development and graphic design. I have previously worked at the Swedish Enforcement Agency (Kronofogden) in finance and IT. Also, as an accountant for five years and teaching computer science, which has come in handy in my current position. In my next job, I am looking for the opportunity to work with topics related to Web development and graphic design. These are topics I feel an extra big motivation for, and that makes me do the little extra. For example, as the Enforcement Officer, I have been able to use my knowledge in programming with MS Excel, which has resulted in more efficient work in the local section. I can contribute with humility, accuracy, and an excellent ability to work together in your workplace and my professional competence. I enjoy working both individually and in groups.
